lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਡੀਠੀ ਸਭ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: ein man ddeetthee sabh aavan jaanee |
lines.english: they see in their minds that everyone comes and goes in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur seve sadaa man nihachal nij ghar vaasaa paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, they become stable forever, and they obtain their dwelling in the home of the self. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa maar sach samaanee |
lines.english: Subduing their desires, they merge with the True One;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad ridai dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord is seen within one's own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabad jalaaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, I have burned my emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਸਚੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo sach raate tin sachee liv laagee |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to Truth are blessed with the Love of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚਾ ਵੇਖਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sacho sachaa vekh saalaahee gurasabadee sach paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: I gaze upon the Truest of the True, and I praise Him. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I obtain the True One. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਹਿ ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: har naam samaaleh se vaddabhaagee |
lines.english: Those who praise the Lord's Name are very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਚੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad aap milaae satasangat sach gun gaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Through the Word of His Shabad, the True One blends with Himself, those who join the True Congregation and sing the Glorious Praises of the True One. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਹੋਰੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anadin sach sabad saalaahee hor koe na keemat paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Night and day, praise the True Word of the Shabad. There is no other way to know His Worth. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਧਿ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ohu agam agochar sabad sudh hovai |
lines.english: He is Inaccessible and Incomprehensible; through the Shabad, understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਪੜੀਐ ਜੇ ਲੇਖੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa parreeai je lekhe vich hovai |
lines.english: We could read the account of the Lord, if He were in any account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: parr parr thaake saant na aaee |
lines.english: People read and recite until they grow weary, but they do not find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਜਾਲੇ ਸੁਧਿ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa jaale sudh na kaaee |
lines.english: Consumed by desire, they have no understanding at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਬਿਹਾਝਹਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਮੋਹ ਪਿਆਸੇ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bikh bihaajheh bikh moh piaase koorr bol bikh khaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: They purchase poison, and they are thirsty with their fascination for poison. Telling lies, they eat poison. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee eko jaanaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I know the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa maar man sach samaanaa |
lines.english: Subduing my sense of duality, my mind is absorbed into the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧੭॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak eko naam varatai man antar gur parasaadee paavaniaa |8|17|18|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Name is pervading deep within my mind; by Guru's Grace, I receive it. ||8||17||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨ ਰੂਪ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: varan roop varateh sabh tere |
lines.english: In all colors and forms, You are pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਫੇਰ ਪਵਹਿ ਘਣੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mar mar jameh fer paveh ghanere |
lines.english: People die over and over again; they are re-born, and make their rounds on the wheel of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਏਕੋ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: toon eko nihachal agam apaaraa guramatee boojh bujhaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: You alone are Eternal and Unchanging, Inaccessible and Infinite. Through the Guru's Teachings, understanding is imparted. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree raam naam man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Lord's Name in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਵਰਨੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis roop na rekhiaa varan na koee guramatee aap bujhaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord has no form, features or color. Through the Guru's Teachings, He inspires us to understand Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਏਕਾ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੇ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ekaa jot jaanai je koee |
lines.english: The One Light is all-pervading; only a few know this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gupat paragatt varatai sabh thaaee jotee jot milaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: In the hidden and in the obvious, He is pervading all places. Our light merges into the Light. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai paragatt hoee |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, this is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਜਲੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tisanaa agan jalai sansaaraa |
lines.english: The world is burning in the fire of desire,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਏ ਅਪਣੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mar mar janamai pat gavaae apanee birathaa janam gavaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: People die over and over again; they are re-born, and lose their honor. They waste away their lives in vain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: lobh abhimaan bahut ahankaaraa |
lines.english: in greed, arrogance and excessive ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad ko viralaa boojhai |
lines.english: Those who understand the Word of the Guru's Shabad are very rare.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਮਾਰੇ ਤਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap maare taa tribhavan soojhai |
lines.english: Those who subdue their egotism, come to know the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਓਹੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਮਰਣਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: fir ohu marai na maranaa hovai sahaje sach samaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Then, they die, never to die again. They are intuitively absorbed in the True One. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa meh fir chit na laae |
lines.english: They do not focus their consciousness on Maya again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਸਭ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sach salaahe sabh ghatt antar sacho sach suhaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: They praise the True One, who is contained deep within all hearts. They are blessed and exalted by the Truest of the True. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sad rahai samaae |
lines.english: They remain absorbed forever in the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach saalaahee sadaa hajoore |
lines.english: Praise the True One, who is Ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਵੈ ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee sach nadaree aavai sache hee sukh paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, we come to behold the True One; from the True One, peace is obtained. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad rahiaa bharapoore |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੋ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sache laagai so man niramal guramatee sach samaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Those who are attached to the True One are immaculate and pure. Through the Guru's Teachings, they merge in the True One. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach man andar rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: The True One permeates and pervades the mind within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sach nihachal aavai na jaae |
lines.english: The True One is Eternal and Unchanging; He does not come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jit seviai sadaa sukh hoee |
lines.english: Serving Him, eternal peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sach saalaahee avar na koee |
lines.english: Praise the True One, and no other.
